name: deep-research-v2
description: V2 deep research prototype: parallel source research, claim verification foreach, final reduce with optional ask continuation. Required input file: DEEP_RESEARCH_BRIEF.md.

tasks.prompt: Read DEEP_RESEARCH_BRIEF.md if present. Research the source landscape from repository context and return JSON with a claims array.
Read DEEP_RESEARCH_BRIEF.md if present. Research technical/API details from repository context and return JSON with a claims array.
Read DEEP_RESEARCH_BRIEF.md if present. Research risks, limitations, costs, and failure modes from repository context and return JSON with a claims array.

each.prompt: Verify this claim against available evidence: ${item}. Return JSON with claim, status, evidence, and caveats.

stages.prompt: Use Source Stage Context to produce a cited finalReport. If concrete evidence gaps remain, include a bounded nextFlowSpec; otherwise omit nextFlowSpec.
